extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Setup for HW #2, Prob. 2: analyzing Intel as a microprocessor company within the IT industry.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Frames Homework #2, Problem 2 in the context of the IT industry, which contains the computer industry, disk-drive industry (Prob. 1) and microprocessor industry (Prob. 2, Intel). Intel is described in two phases: as a DRAM company (1968–~1974) and as a microprocessor company (~1974–present/1997). The assigned task is to analyze Intel, the microprocessor company, including a structural analysis.
